changes: Resolved an issue wherein the amount of HP recovered when only healing self using the action 'Shake It Off' was incorrect under certain conditions.

new_content.name: The Omega Protocol (Ultimate)
new_content.description: A high-end ultimate duty where players imagine a scenario where Omega's relentless testing continued to its ultimate conclusion.
